name: Company Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15 oz.) cut green beans, drained
1 can (10 3/4 oz.) cream of mushroom soup
1/2 a 5 oz. jar Old English cheese, sharp
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large mixing bowl.
2. Transfer the mixture to a casserole dish.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Bake for 30 minutes or until heated through.
5. The recipe can be easily doubled.
